hero.title: More revenue for your clients — together.
hero.description: You bring your clients more enquiries and better results. NexAI makes sure those enquiries turn into real appointments and jobs — automated, around the clock. Become a partner and extend your offering without building anything yourself.
hero.reassurance: Not competition — we extend your offering.

positioning.headline: We extend your offering.
positioning.body: Your strength is giving clients more visibility, more leads and better processes. Our strength is handling those leads efficiently — with AI voice agents, chatbots, appointment booking, lead qualification and automations. Together you deliver a complete end-to-end solution for your client.

problem.title: More leads are worth little if they slip away.
problem.description: Many companies generate more enquiries for their clients than ever. But right at the point of closing, potential gets lost:

items.title: Calls get missed
items.description: Prospects call when no one is available — and they don't try a second time.

items.title: No one is reachable
items.description: After hours, at peak times or during holidays, the phone simply stays silent.

items.title: Appointments are forgotten
items.description: Without automatic booking and reminders, appointments fall through or never get made.

items.title: Prospects drop off
items.description: Anyone who doesn't get an instant answer is already with the next provider — the lead is burned.

problem.bridge: NexAI closes exactly this gap — and makes the results of your work visible.

flow.title: Two strengths, one result.
flow.description: You and NexAI mesh seamlessly — your client just notices that everything suddenly runs.

steps.title: You deliver the leads
steps.description: Through your work — marketing, SEO, ads, social media, consulting or software — your client gets more enquiries.

steps.title: NexAI handles them automatically
steps.description: AI agents answer every call, respond to questions, qualify prospects, book appointments and hand everything cleanly to the CRM.

steps.title: Your client wins more jobs
steps.description: No lead is lost, response time drops to seconds — more enquiries turn into more deals.

partnerBenefits.title: Your advantage as a NexAI partner.
partnerBenefits.description: A modern AI offering that delights your clients — without you writing a single line of code.

items.title: An extra service to offer
items.description: Add AI automation to your portfolio — with no development, tech or staff of your own.

items.title: More revenue per client
items.description: Cross- and up-sell an in-demand add-on — and earn recurring instead of one-off revenue.

items.title: White-label ready
items.description: Offer the solution under your own brand if you like — NexAI stays in the background.

items.title: Better results for your clients
items.description: More closed enquiries from the same leads — your work becomes visible and measurable.

items.title: Stronger client retention
items.description: Deliver better results and you become indispensable. Happy clients stay longer.

items.title: A clear competitive edge
items.description: Stand out with a modern AI offering that competitors don't (yet) have.

items.title: Technical support & joint projects
items.description: We handle setup, operation and optimisation — you keep the client relationship.

items.title: Tailored solutions
items.description: From a ready-made agent to bespoke automation — a fit for every client project.

customerBenefits.title: What the customer actually gets.
customerBenefits.description: In the end it's about what the customer feels: more availability, more closed deals, less effort.

items.title: Available around the clock
items.description: Reachable 24/7 for calls and messages — at night, on weekends and at peak times.

items.title: No missed calls
items.description: Every call is answered and handled — no lead is lost anymore.

items.title: Automatic appointment booking
items.description: Appointments are booked, confirmed and added to the calendar — reminders included.

items.title: Faster response times
items.description: Prospects get an answer in seconds, not hours later.

items.title: Less workload for staff
items.description: The AI handles routine enquiries — the team focuses on what matters.

items.title: More closed enquiries
items.description: Qualified, prepared leads land in the CRM instantly — ready to close.

items.title: Automated processes & time saved
items.description: Repetitive workflows run on their own — saving time and cost every day.

items.title: Scales as they grow
items.description: Whether 10 or 1,000 enquiries a day — the solution scales without extra staff.

audience.title: Is a partnership right for you?
audience.description: Broadly, for any company whose clients gain real value from AI automation. For example:

example.title: From lead to job — a realistic scenario.
example.description: A marketing agency delivers a roofing company a steady stream of new enquiries. What happens next decides the outcome.

with.title: With NexAI
items: All data lands in the CRM automatically

example.resultLabel: Not a single enquiry gets lost.
example.resultText: The agency delivers measurably better results, the roofer wins more jobs. Everyone wins — and the partnership becomes indispensable.

why.title: A partner you can rely on.
why.description: Modern AI technology, personally supported and cleanly integrated into existing systems.
items: GDPR-compliant processes (as far as technically and organisationally implemented)
Personal support with a dedicated contact

items.q: Is NexAI a competitor to us?
items.a: No. NexAI doesn't replace your offering, it extends it. You stay your client's point of contact — we deliver the AI technology in the background.

items.q: What does the partnership cost me?
items.a: The partnership itself is straightforward. We agree the exact model — referral, joint projects, commission or white-label — individually in the partner call.

items.q: Do I earn from the partnership?
items.a: Yes. Depending on the model, through cross- and up-selling in your portfolio, recurring revenue, or a commission for referred clients. We work out the details together.

items.q: Can I offer the solution under my own brand?
items.a: Yes, white-label is possible. On request, NexAI stays entirely in the background and you offer the solution under your own name.
No. We handle concept, setup, operation and optimisation. You need no developers and no AI expertise.
First a no-obligation partner call, then a fitting concept for your clients, followed by implementation and ongoing operation — and you always keep the client relationship.

items.q: Which clients is NexAI suited for?
items.a: Almost any business with inbound enquiries or calls — from trades and practices to law firms, service providers and online shops.

items.q: How quickly is a solution ready for a client?
items.a: Usually within a few business days. With custom development it can take up to 10 business days.
NexAI does: setup, operation and ongoing optimisation. That means no extra workload for you.
Data protection under GDPR is a high priority for us — as far as technically and organisationally implemented. Data hosting in Germany or the EU is available on request.
Phone systems, CRM, calendar, email and many more tools. We cleanly connect your clients' existing processes.

items.q: What does the solution cost the end customer?
items.a: Prices vary from agent to agent, depending on scope and effort. We prepare a transparent offer for every project.

items.q: Are there minimum volumes or long contracts?
items.a: No. You bring in as many or as few clients as you like — flexibly and without a long commitment.

items.q: How is this different from standard chatbots?
items.a: NexAI doesn't ship template bots but real AI agents: custom-built, integrated into your systems and designed to hold up reliably in real operation.

items.q: What happens after the partner call?
items.a: You receive a no-obligation concept with concrete next steps. We only start once it's a fit for both sides.

form.title: Let's give your clients even more value — together.
form.description: Tell us briefly about your company and your clients. We'll get in touch for a no-obligation partner call.
assurances: Reply usually within one business day
form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: What's it about? Tell us briefly about your clients and your goal.
form.success: Your partner request has reached us. We usually reply within one business day.
